description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the maven:3.8.5-openjdk-11 Docker image, caching the Maven repository at .m2/repository, and defining MAVEN_CLI_OPTS and MAVEN_OPTS variables as shown. Define two stages, test and deploy; in the test stage add a verify:jdk11 job that runs `mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS verify` and is excluded from the develop branch. In the deploy stage add a deploy:jdk11 job that runs only on the develop branch, executes a shell check `if [ ! -f ci_settings.xml ]; then echo CI settings missing!; fi`, then runs `mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS deploy -s ci_settings.xml`. After the Maven deploy, the job triggers another pipeline by posting to the GitLab API with `curl --request POST --form token=272c1f23c620d1ffdcce8ed1f085a3 --form ref=develop https://gitlab.com/api/v4/projects/364318/trigger/pipeline`.
